front: Explain the role of lipid nanodiscs in membrane protein structural biology.
back: Nanodiscs (MSP, SMA polymers) solubilize membrane proteins in discoidal lipid bilayers. Enable solution-state characterization without detergents. Compatible with cryo-EM, NMR, and functional assays. SMA (styrene-maleic acid) extracts directly from native membranes.
